title: StructuredDiff
description: Semantic diff produced by a ForgeHandler. Output of ForgeHandler.Diff(); consumed by Forge CLI renderers and ForgeHub web viewers.

version.description: Schema version. Minor bumps are backwards-compatible additions. Major bumps are breaking.

format.description: Handler format identifier. Lowercase, no dots. Used by viewers to select a renderer.

changes.description: Top-level list of semantic changes. May be nested via 'children'.

metadata.description: Optional handler-defined extras at the diff level (e.g. thumbnails, stats, preview frames).

path.description: Semantic address of the changed unit within the file's domain model. Format is handler-defined but should be human-readable.

kind.description: 'added': unit exists in head but not base. 'removed': exists in base but not head. 'modified': exists in both but changed.

label.description: Optional human-readable display name for this change. Falls back to 'path' if absent.

before.description: Value before the change. Required when kind is 'removed' or 'modified'. Absent or null for 'added'.

after.description: Value after the change. Required when kind is 'added' or 'modified'. Absent or null for 'removed'.

children.description: Nested changes within this semantic unit. Used when a compound object changed and its sub-fields should be listed separately.

metadata.description: Optional handler-defined extras at the change level (e.g. a per-node thumbnail, a line range, a bounding box).

DiffValue.description: Any JSON-representable value. For binary data (thumbnails, preview images, audio snippets) use the binary envelope object described below.

oneOf.title: Binary envelope
oneOf.description: Used when the value cannot be represented as JSON (e.g. a PNG thumbnail, a PCM audio snippet). Base64-encoded.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the decoded bytes.
